top_entities.name: Philippines
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): ICC detained former president Duterte for crimes against humanity. Hundreds of children arrested during anti-corruption protests. Journalists killed. Drug war killings continuing.

top_entities.name: Cuba
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Apr 2026 prisoner release excluded political prisoners. 700+ political prisoners remain. Hundreds face house arrest. 2026 Cuban crisis ongoing. Government excluded those convicted of contempt, propaganda, and assault from release.

top_entities.name: Ukraine
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Ukraine struck overnight Jun 17-18 — 212 drones, 4 ballistic missiles. Sumy: 90+ attacks, 3 civilians killed. Dnipro hit Jun 18. Jun 15: Dormition Cathedral of Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra struck, 5 killed, 44 injured. UN: June 2026 highest civilian deaths in 3 years.

top_entities.name: Bolivia
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Bolivia week-6 protests continue. 10 dead, 37 injured. Legislature passed enhanced emergency powers Jun 15. President Paz wearing-down strategy — army authorized but not deployed. 103 road blockades. $1.6B economic losses. US labeled movement narco-terrorist.

top_entities.name: India
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): HRW Jun 16 2026 — India BSF unlawfully expelling ethnic Bengali Muslims to Bangladesh. 21 pushback attempts since Jun 1, 200+ people including children. Since May 7: 1,500+ expelled, ~100 Rohingya to Myanmar. West Bengal BJP government "detect, delete, deport" policy. Families stranded at zero-line.

top_entities.name: Israel
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Gaza 3,269 ceasefire violations Oct 2025-Jun 9 2026. 77% of population acutely food insecure. 150,000+ children need acute malnutrition treatment. Only 36% of allocated aid trucks entered. UN school in Jabalia struck. Israel expanded Yellow Line displacing more families. 4,000+ cancer patients at risk.

top_entities.name: Uganda
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Uganda — 19 confirmed Ebola (Bundibugyo) cases, 2 deaths. Secondary transmission occurring. Epidemiologically linked to DRC outbreak. PHEIC declared May 17 remains active.

top_entities.name: Burkina Faso
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Burkina Faso government/allied forces killed more than twice as many civilians as Islamist militants since 2023. Likely war crimes and crimes against humanity. Part of 52.8M at acute food insecurity across Sahel lean season peak.

top_entities.name: Mali
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Mali government forces and Russian Africa Corps killed 3-4x more civilians than jihadists. Possible war crimes including summary executions, indiscriminate airstrikes, rape. 52.8M at acute food insecurity across Sahel. 2026 Mali offensives escalating.

top_entities.name: Democratic Republic of C
top_entities.news_summary: ESCALATING CRITICAL (Jun 18 2026): DRC Ebola (Bundibugyo) — 837 confirmed cases, 196 confirmed deaths, 376 hospitalized as of Jun 15. 29 new cases since Jun 16. Ituri: 767 cases (20 zones). Burial team attacked; 5 workers taken hostage in Mongbwalu. Africa CDC warns could be worst Ebola outbreak in history.

top_entities.name: Iran
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Iran 784 executions in 2026 YTD. 125th consecutive weekly prison protest across 56 facilities. Jun 16: Javad Zamani and Abolfazl Saeedi executed for Jan 2026 protest participation. Amnesty documented torture including simulated hangings. Protest-linked executions continuing.

top_entities.name: Russia
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18 2026): Russia overnight Jun 17-18: 4 Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles + 212 drones strike Ukraine. Sumy region 90+ attacks, 3 civilians killed. Dnipro struck Jun 18. UN mission: June 2026 highest civilian fatality month in 3 years.

sector_alerts.title: DRC/Uganda Ebola PHEIC escalating — 837 cases / 196 deaths; Africa CDC warns could be worst ever
sector_alerts.summary: As of Jun 15: 837 confirmed cases, 196 deaths, 376 hospitalized. Burial team attacked; 5 workers taken hostage. Africa CDC warning of historic scale. Uganda: 19 cases, 2 deaths. No vaccine. $518M response plan active.

sector_alerts.title: Bolivia week-6 protests — 10 dead, enhanced emergency powers in force, army authorized
sector_alerts.summary: Week 6. 10 dead, 37 injured. 103 road blockades. $1.6B economic losses. Enhanced emergency powers signed Jun 15. Army authorized but Paz holding off. US labeled narco-terrorist.

sector_alerts.title: Russia/Ukraine — Jun 17-18 mass attack; June 2026 highest civilian fatality month in 3 years
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 17-18: 212 drones + 4 ballistic missiles. Sumy 90+ attacks, 3 civilians killed. Dnipro struck Jun 18. UN: June 2026 highest civilian fatality month since war start. Dormition Cathedral struck Jun 15 (5 dead, 44 injured).

sector_alerts.title: Iran — 784 executions 2026 YTD; 125th consecutive weekly prison protest; protest-linked executions continuing
sector_alerts.summary: 784 executions in 2026. 125th week of Tuesdays No to Executions hunger strikes in 56 prisons. Jun 16: Two executed for Jan 2026 protest participation. Amnesty: torture documented including mock hangings.

sector_alerts.title: Apple Towson Store closing Jun 20 — IAM NLRB charge active, 54 Congress members demanded investigation
sector_alerts.summary: First unionized US Apple Store (Towson Town Center) closing Jun 20. IAM: Apple denying unionized workers same transfer rights. NLRB unfair labor practice charge filed. Congressional pressure escalating.

sector_alerts.title: Sahel lean season peak — 52.8M at acute food insecurity; Somalia famine risk; WFP critically underfunded
sector_alerts.scope: countries/mali, countries/burkina-faso, countries/niger, countries/nigeria, countries/chad, countries/somalia
sector_alerts.summary: Jun-Aug lean season peak. Nigeria Borno: 15,000 IPC Phase 5. Somalia: famine in Burhakaba. UN released $10M emergency. WFP halts assistance Jul without $131M. Sahel appeal 28% funded.

sector_alerts.title: EU AI Act Digital Omnibus — high-risk deadline extended to Dec 2027; two new prohibited practices Dec 2026
sector_alerts.summary: Digital Omnibus (May 7 2026 provisional agreement): Annex III extended Aug 2026 to Dec 2027. New prohibited practices (non-consensual intimate imagery, CSAM) taking effect Dec 2026. GPAI rules enforceable since Aug 2025. Fines up to EUR 35M or 7% global turnover for Article 5 violations.

sector_alerts.title: US SNAP/Medicaid work requirements — December 2026 deadline approaching; states implementing
sector_alerts.summary: One Big Beautiful Bill: Medicaid work requirements accelerated to Dec 31 2026. Illinois/California rolling back immigrant coverage. Emergency housing vouchers ending late 2026 (70,000 at risk). HHS guidance due June 2026.

sector_alerts.title: UAW supplier strike active — American Axle walkout Jun 1 could disrupt GM/Ford/Stellantis
sector_alerts.summary: American Axle Michigan: nearly 1,000 UAW members struck Jun 1. Parts shortage risk at all three major OEMs. UAW Health and Safety Conference postponed. Ford Kentucky Truck Plant: 9,000 workers served strike notice on health/safety.

sector_alerts.title: Global housing crisis — UN-Habitat World Cities Report 2026 released; 3.4B lacking adequate housing
sector_alerts.summary: Report launched WUF13 May 19 2026. 3.4B lack adequate housing. 288M unit deficit globally. 64M evicted 2003-2023. Housing inequality primary driver of wealth inequality. Calls for binding right-to-housing commitments.
